source_hash_scope: AgentGuard shared contract, gateway app/tests, Buyer/Seller manifests, locks, public assets, shared packages, frontend source and build configuration; docs and evidence excluded

targeted_adversarial.command: cd aadharchain/gateway && PYTHONPATH=. PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q -p asyncio tests/test_agentguard_contract.py tests/test_agentguard.py tests/test_commerce_demo.py tests/test_payment_adapter.py tests/test_social_auth.py tests/test_demo_dependency_independence.py

commands: cd ondcbuyer && npx vitest run --reporter=json && npm run typecheck && npm run build
cd ondcseller && npx vitest run --reporter=json && npm run typecheck && npm run build
cd ondcbuyer && npx vitest run --reporter=json && npm run typecheck && npm run build
cd ondcseller && npx vitest run --reporter=json && npm run typecheck && npm run build

warnings: Gateway emitted dependency deprecation warnings only.
Buyer build emitted the existing greater-than-500-kB chunk-size advisory.
